h2eb419b2g8a84g4d4ag88f5gc664b4a0aea7: *The twilight is darker than expected. Moisture drips down your forehead; pain shoots through your fingers.*
h8043bd75gbd12g4084g9da6g61302f7ea565: *Your hands shake as they reach upward. Your forehead remains drenched, no matter how much you wipe.*
hf89ee1cegcacfg40aegbf19ga4e424f6562e: Can you feel it crawling through you? Tendrils squirming in your chest, gripping your heart, piercing your belly? Your bones popping, your flesh swelling?
h09ad5300g2c40g4fe3g8a2dg6bb734ed390c: I can. I see it in you. I feel it in me. We are lost.
h1751a56dgedb9g448fg9f68gdaddebba1973: I will be quick with my blade. First you. Then the others. Then myself.
h8b4fa6f3gb149g4261g9cffgc80ca3eec5a4: *Your minds intertwine. You sense a touch of uncertainty, a touch of disgust.*
h31c31140g5c74g4140gafe0g68d1bff9eec7: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
h4a1ae7acg2a40g45dcga420gf7b8b2098bda: *Lae'zel's fear grips you. Not fear of death, but fear of insignificance.*
hd21543b0g513dg454bg953eg66cfddeaf505: *The great warrior Lae'zel, a failure to her kind. She will wield no silver sword, ride no red dragon, forever unknown to the great lich Queen Vlaakith.*
he136102agd19bg417dga62cgd9b26ecba9c4: *Something stirs deep within you, hungry and alert... it's taking something you'll never get back.*
ha3244346g4b6fg4ebdga960gfd69694fe1c1: *Your mind lurches, reeling suddenly as if... bitten.*
hb01a49d5g18abg4b4cga669g36743d435f98: *A shadow swims across your vision, and a familiar voice tells you to be calm. You are loved.*
h3da9f667gd18cg4ba7g9ffag361c7a6b930f: *Your blood runs quicker, feeding the gnawing absence at the centre of your mind.*
hd8f917abg3104g452bga097gdb5bfb5cbdb9: *The presence deep in your mind is awake, unblinking. This is it. A single word pervades your consciousness: 'Soon'.*
h901ba98bg910dg40e6gbdddg1d816ad0330b: *Your mind is full, bursting with ecstasy and terror. Finally, it is coming. You are becoming.*
ha7194754g4276g4b82gab5agcce502e3d5c0: *Lae'zel's mind holds you at length. Her thoughts remain unknown.*
h7904cc75g7533g4aaeg8a85ga542fd5f0dbc: Be strong. You will survive this. You will please your queen!
h250e6a33gf04ag46d1ga868gbcc03ec5970a: I will not let the ghaik take me. I will earn Vlaakith's honour.
h0468c2b6gb4b1g40f2gbaa9g7095952acc75: I will wait. But know this: I am watching. If the sickness does not pass come dawn...
hd7d481f2gb922g4676g91c5g94c3e4a401d0: We're just exhausted. Lower the blade before you do something foolish.
hc550156fg08eag45bbga73ag89dff31ebb4f: Bah - I cannot trust my own mind. So it seems I must trust yours.
he9861ff0g72f6g41f3g859dgc24992aafe81: It feels as if a snake is slithering through every limb. My throat burns like flames erupted within.
h37468df7g1e46g4a5dgb83dgb39ca5fa412e: This is not exhaustion. This is ceremorphosis.
h18ab35adg4145g49afg9225g7a138c8c6965: It's just a fever. Rest will break it.
h892d7480g11e2g41e0ga1ceg07f54c329468: This is no simple fever. This is ceremorphosis.
hf835a61egf0e0g4fdag9081g4addd42c50ce: Don't you see how far gone you are? Give me that blade - I'll make it quick.
ha81e314ag69d1g40a4gab20gef474959a4b0: The monster in you craves birth. I trust no one but me to deny it.
h3784df4eg1b56g46e8g86ffgd9d455be4871: Take it. One motion. Across the neck.
hb10eb4ecg7d4dg4613g9092g40c69818115d: No one is dying tonight. We still have time.
h24bb28b6gb3a6g4855gaeb4g64f332618a54: Chk - a splendid ruse. My anger is surpassed only by my respect.
h7fad0852gd60dg48b5g9193g8d395a47f0b4: I will not be ghaik. Vlaakith gha'g shkath zai!
he78339f7gc541g4283gb41eg7f9384c4b14a: Surrender to Lae'zel. You will not become an abomination.
hb96ef52ag952bg4406gb2c9gccbcd5d4cb39: Let it be so. Vlaakith gha'g shkath zai!
hcc06dc83g230eg43bbg922eg0619d4fe9283: *The ache builds as you squeeze your hands together. Were your fingers always so thick, your skin always so sticky?*
h4e3d210dg9b90g4eedg9ba0g01ccd1a21e9d: *Your finger traces the arc of your lips. Wetness: sweat, blood, and saliva mixed into one viscous liquid.*
h2cb03994g0199g476dgbdfegf874308eb440: *The world swims as you close, then reopen your eyes. How long have you been waiting here? A moment? A night? A tenday?*
